summary: First implementation test of routine management app - All core features working correctly. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows tested and working (login, navigation, CRUD operations).

minor.issue: server.py line 24: DB_NAME has default value 'routine_app' - should fail fast if env var missing

issues: Shadow* style props deprecation warnings in Expo logs (not critical, cosmetic only)

action_items: Consider removing default value for DB_NAME in server.py line 24 to fail fast on missing env var
Consider removing default empty string for BASE_URL in frontend/src/utils/api.ts line 3
Optional: Update shadow* props to boxShadow to remove deprecation warnings
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend uses bcrypt for password hashing with proper salt generation
✓ JWT tokens properly implemented with access and refresh tokens
✓ MongoDB ObjectId excluded from API responses
✓ All endpoints use proper HTTP status codes (200, 400, 401, 404)
✓ Admin user seeding is idempotent with password update logic
✓ Frontend uses React Native components correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ Proper error handling in API calls with token refresh logic
Minor: DB_NAME and BASE_URL have default values instead of failing fast

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical flows working: login, navigation, today view, routines list, settings, create routine)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test routines and items with TEST_ prefix for easy identification. Admin user (admin@example.com / admin123) already seeded by backend on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: First implementation fully tested. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI renders properly on mobile viewport. Login flow, navigation, and CRUD operations all functional. Test data with TEST_ prefix exists in database from this test run.

test_categories.auth: 6/6 passed (login, register, me, invalid credentials, duplicate email, no token)
test_categories.routines: 4/4 passed (create, get, update, delete with persistence verification)

tested_screens: Login screen - email/password inputs, login button, error display
Today tab - greeting, progress bar, routine groups, task items, FAB
Routines tab - routine list, streak indicators, FAB
Settings tab - account info, theme toggle (light/dark/system), language switch (EN/DE), notifications toggle, logout button
Create routine screen - name/description inputs, icon picker, color picker, recurrence options, weekly day selection, save button
tested_flows: Login with admin credentials → redirect to Today tab
Create new routine → save → verify in list

mobile_design_review.touch_targets: All buttons appear to be minimum 44x44 points
mobile_design_review.contrast: Good contrast between text and backgrounds
mobile_design_review.keyboard_handling: KeyboardAvoidingView implemented in login and create screens
